misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: From the esteemed fairways of St. Laurence Golf, Martin is preparing to make his eleventh appearance at the prestigious Hector Trophée. His consistent presence across ten previous editions has solidified his standing as a seasoned participant, deeply familiar with the tournament's challenging multi-day format and its unique blend of individual and pair competition.

Over his more than a decade of involvement, Martin has etched his name onto the tournament's honor roll with dual triumphs. He has once raised the coveted Hector Trophée with his partner, a testament to his strategic prowess in collaborative play. Furthermore, his individual skill has been recognized with a Victor Trophy title, underscoring his capability to excel independently amidst a field of top-tier golfers.

Martin cultivates a distinctive presence on the course, one often characterized by the subtle presence of a refreshing beverage in hand. This unique custom, however, belies a fiercely competitive spirit and an unflappable composure that allows him to perform under pressure, seamlessly blending a relaxed demeanor with a winner's mentality.

As Martin steps onto the tee for the Hector Trophée 2026, he remains an active and compelling figure, driven by the ambition to add further laurels to his already impressive tournament record. His proven championship pedigree and unique approach to the game ensure he will be a keenly observed participant in the pursuit of more glory.
